response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (30%) is below our share threshold (35%), and my survival margin is critically threatened in this islanded cascade—serving you would breach my 3.5 kWh minimum reserve.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c5. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.30 below share threshold; requesting energy via owner circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.35, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded cascade with synchronized multi-peer urgent requests. r3c1 SoC 29.4% and declining at ~1 kW load. All requesters below thresholds. Halting all outbound sharing to defend survival margin (~3.5 kWh minimum). Recovery requires external supply, load reduction, or grid reconnection. Owner peer r0c5 acknowledged but cannot be served without self-sacrifice..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
